calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Mar-22-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peter Ledesma, Esq. 510-681-6916 of Benson Legal for Plaintiff.
Christian Arturo Ruiz (Mazariegos) 707-304-2984 Defendant in Pro Per.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court announces it has not received an email contesting the matter. The Court reads the tentative ruling and both sides submit to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF CHRISTIAN ARTURO RUIZ.

GRANTED IN PART. Debtor Ruiz to remit $60 per pay period to service the judgment.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
